name: PlanetScale
description: PlanetScale is a serverless MySQL-compatible database platform built on Vitess. Use this API to manage databases, branches, deploy requests, passwords, backups, organizations, webhooks, and connection credentials programmatically.

capabilities.name: databases_list
capabilities.description: List all databases in a PlanetScale organization with optional search and pagination.

capabilities.name: databases_create
capabilities.description: Create a new database in your PlanetScale organization.

capabilities.name: databases_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific database by name.

capabilities.name: databases_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a database and all its branches.

capabilities.name: databases_update_settings
capabilities.description: Update database settings such as default branch and configuration.

capabilities.name: branches_list
capabilities.description: List all branches for a specific database.

capabilities.name: branches_create
capabilities.description: Create a new branch for a database from a parent branch or backup.

capabilities.name: branches_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific database branch.

capabilities.name: branches_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a database branch.

capabilities.name: branches_get_schema
capabilities.description: Retrieve the schema of a database branch including tables, columns, and indexes.

capabilities.name: branches_promote
capabilities.description: Promote a branch to production status.

capabilities.name: branches_demote
capabilities.description: Demote a production branch to development status.

capabilities.name: branches_enable_safe_migrations
capabilities.description: Enable safe migrations (DDL protection) on a branch.

capabilities.name: branches_disable_safe_migrations
capabilities.description: Disable safe migrations on a branch.

capabilities.name: branches_lint_schema
capabilities.description: Lint the schema of a branch for potential issues.

capabilities.name: deploy_requests_list
capabilities.description: List deploy requests for a database.

capabilities.name: deploy_requests_create
capabilities.description: Create a new deploy request to merge schema changes from one branch to another.

capabilities.name: deploy_requests_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific deploy request.

capabilities.name: deploy_requests_close
capabilities.description: Close a deploy request without deploying.

capabilities.name: deploy_requests_queue
capabilities.description: Queue a deploy request for deployment.

capabilities.name: deploy_requests_review
capabilities.description: Submit a review (approve or comment) on a deploy request.

capabilities.name: deploy_requests_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a queued deploy request.

capabilities.name: deploy_operations_list
capabilities.description: List deploy operations for a specific deploy request.

capabilities.name: passwords_list
capabilities.description: List all connection passwords for a database branch.

capabilities.name: passwords_create
capabilities.description: Create a new connection password for a database branch.

capabilities.name: passwords_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific connection password.

capabilities.name: passwords_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a connection password.

capabilities.name: passwords_renew
capabilities.description: Renew an expiring connection password.

capabilities.name: backups_list
capabilities.description: List all backups for a database branch.

capabilities.name: backups_create
capabilities.description: Create a new backup of a database branch.

capabilities.name: backups_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific backup.

capabilities.name: backups_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a database backup.

capabilities.name: organizations_list
capabilities.description: List all organizations the authenticated user belongs to.

capabilities.name: organizations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific organization.

capabilities.name: organizations_update
capabilities.description: Update organization settings.

capabilities.name: organizations_list_members
capabilities.description: List members of an organization.

capabilities.name: organizations_remove_member
capabilities.description: Remove a member from an organization.

capabilities.name: webhooks_list
capabilities.description: List all webhooks configured for a database.

capabilities.name: webhooks_create
capabilities.description: Create a new webhook for a database.

capabilities.name: webhooks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific webhook.

capabilities.name: webhooks_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing webhook configuration.

capabilities.name: webhooks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a webhook.

capabilities.name: webhooks_test
capabilities.description: Send a test event to a webhook endpoint.

capabilities.name: deploy_queue_get
capabilities.description: Get the current deploy queue for a database.

capabilities.name: users_get_current
capabilities.description: Get the currently authenticated user's details.

capabilities.name: audit_logs_list
capabilities.description: List audit log entries for an organization.

capabilities.name: regions_list
capabilities.description: List available public regions for database deployment.
